HGSS.700.0001:
Hey!
Trade phone numbers with\r
me, old buddy! [0200,0000]
HGSS.700.0002:
Call me sometime!
I’ll call you sometimes, too!
HGSS.700.0004:
Hey, hey!
This time, let’s get our phone\r
numbers traded, old buddy! [0200,0000]
HGSS.700.0005:
Wah ha ha! [0103,0000,0000]!
Here’s that Dawn Stone you wanted.\f
Here you go.\f
...And now that you’ve got what you
came here for, SCRAM!\f
HGSS.700.0006:
It’s dangerous to talk on the phone
while riding on Cycling Road, but\r
sometimes I’ve got no choice!\f
If you’re nearby, let’s talk in person!
HGSS.700.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] has gotten way strong!\f
It knocked out a wild [0100,000B,0000] in,
like, two seconds!\r
Wahahahahahahaha!\f
...What?
You think I’m exaggerating?\f
Put a lid on it! Nothing but truth!
HGSS.700.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] has gotten
awesomely strong!\f
We can go catch [0100,000B,0000] now!
HGSS.700.0009:
Recently, I came across a wild
[0100,000B,0000] on the road.\f
Suddenly, out it jumps! I fell off
my Bike trying not to hit it!\f
But it’s all good, even though I got a
little scraped up.\f
It’s all good ’cause I like to be nice to
wild Pokémon!
HGSS.700.0010:
Hey! Right now, I’m
on [0104,0003,0000]!\f
Don’t run, don’t hide, just get over
here and fight me!
HGSS.700.0011:
Listen! Here I wait on good old
[0104,0003,0000]!\f
Time for us to have another battle,
fair and square, so come alone!\f
Wait...
Bring your Pokémon with you!\r
Without a Pokémon, we can’t battle!
HGSS.700.0012:
You...
You’ve got a Pokémon with you, right?\f
That’s...
That’s pretty sweet, isn’t it?\f
If you were blazing up and down the
road as fast as you could, like me, you\r
wouldn’t be able to have your Pokémon\r
alongside you.\f
Makes me a bit jealous of you, to tell
the truth.
HGSS.700.0013:
Hey! I picked up something great!\f
I checked it with someone who knows
this stuff. They said it’s a Dawn Stone.\f
If you want it, I’m on
[0104,0003,0000], so come and get it!
HGSS.700.0014:
Listen! Pick up the pace and pick up
this Dawn Stone! On [0104,0003,0000]!
